summary: M10 SaaS Billing & Self-Onboarding System testing completed. Backend: 15/15 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All billing pages working with Bulgarian i18n. Mock Stripe checkout working correctly. Key flows tested: public signup with trial, plan selection, mock upgrade to Pro, billing settings display.

backend: GET /api/billing/plans - returns 3 plans (free, pro, enterprise) with correct structure
GET /api/billing/config - returns stripe_mock_mode and configuration status
POST /api/billing/signup - creates org, user, subscription with 14-day trial
GET /api/billing/subscription - returns plan details, trial_active, trial_days_remaining
POST /api/billing/create-checkout-session - mock mode upgrades subscription directly
GET /api/billing/check-module/{code} - module access based on current plan
POST /api/billing/create-portal-session - mock mode returns portal_url=null with message
POST /api/billing/webhook - accepts and processes webhook payload
frontend: Signup page (/signup) - all form fields present with data-testid attributes
Signup page - Bulgarian translations working (Създаване на акаунт, 14-дневен)
Signup flow - creates account and auto-redirects to dashboard
Plan selection page (/plans) - shows Free/Pro/Enterprise plans with pricing
Plan selection page - mock mode warning displayed
Plan selection page - Popular badge on Pro plan, module lists, limits
Plan selection page - Bulgarian translations (Изберете план, Популярен)
Billing settings page (/billing) - shows current plan with status
Billing settings page - shows included modules as badges (M0, M1, etc)
Billing settings page - shows plan limits (Users, Projects, Storage)
Billing settings page - mock mode warning with env vars listed
Mock checkout - clicking Pro plan upgrades and redirects to success page
Success page - shows payment success message in Bulgarian
Sidebar navigation - Фактуриране link navigates to /billing

test_credentials.new_signup: Created during test with random email

seed_data_used.organizations: BEG_Work Demo (admin org), Test Company BG (signup test), Trial Test Corp (trial test)
seed_data_used.subscriptions: Admin org upgraded to Pro via mock checkout during testing

context_for_next_testing_agent: M10 Billing & SaaS Self-Onboarding is fully functional. Stripe is in MOCK MODE - no real payments. Signup creates org with 14-day free trial. Mock checkout directly upgrades subscription. All pages have Bulgarian translations. Module gating via /api/billing/check-module/{code} works based on plan. Admin org was upgraded to Pro during testing.

mocked_apis.stripe_checkout: MOCK MODE - upgrades subscription directly without payment
mocked_apis.stripe_webhook: Development mode - accepts without signature verification
